programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

It follows the much, much larger-than-life journey of Lev Parnas, a Ukrainian-born hustler and former small-time mafia operator whose random, almost accidental association with Trump and Trump attorney Rudolph Giuliani took him around the world, and ultimately to prison. Lev reveals the ham-handed workings of the furtive campaign to dredge up false but damaging allegations against then-candidate Joe Biden. Directed by Billy Corben.

DeSantis” tells this story through the personal lens of four migrant cousins who now live on the Vineyard, and the lead attorneys and Texas sheriff who are aggressively fighting back against DeSantis and his cronies.

programme.title: Hidden Beauty Of The Ugly

programme.title: Hidden Beauty Of The Ugly

programme.title: The Creative Zone

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hour long pure nature relaxation experience, "A Day In Paradise" immerses viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's most pure and picturesque tropical islands - for an entire day from sunrise, to sunset. Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Sunny Getaways
programme.desc: Unwind by an idyllic stretch of sand where time stands still surrounded by luxurious flora and light navy blue waters.

programme.title: Inspiring Sights
programme.desc: Spend idle hours relaxing in a Caribbean paradise by the lighthouse on the Dominican Republic's Bayahibe beach.

programme.title: Arctic 2
programme.desc: See the vast blue skies and frozen waters of the Arctic meet in real-time, and glimpse beluga pods swimming in icy, jewel-toned waters with their young or herds of moose trekking through the rough and rocky terrain.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: Enjoy the relaxing vibe of a day at the beach with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Dreamscapes: The Voyage to Dallas Austin
programme.desc: The Voyage journey is a digital interpretation of Dallas Austin's life of music and art translated through technology and his friendship with renowned street artist Jona Cerwinske.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E11: Shades Of Brown — Celebrate the rich and earthy palette of brown. From warm sepia tones to deep siennas, the artwork evoke a sense of grounded elegance and rustic charm, exploring the diverse emotions and textures of this versatile color.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E4: Shades of Pink — Showcasing the gorgeous yet delicate energy of pink, utilizing shades ranging from soft blush to bright fuchsia to evoke a sense of sweetness, romance, and vibrancy.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Yellow
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E6: Shades Of Yellow — Capturing the brightness and joyfulness of yellow through various hues and textures, evoking a sense of warmth, optimism, and playfulness.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Painters' Showcase S1E1 — Extraordinary paintings hand-selected by the Loupe team.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Black & White E1 — An extraordinary art collection that embodies timeless beauty and sophistication. Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening: Earth And Stars II
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.
